1.description: This revomon is a swift assassin. Empowered by a mysterious forest energy, it can move through the shadows to stalk its preys.
1.name: Deksciple

2.description: In order to travel between places, Comboworms have to focus their brains and bodies and move in unison. Sometimes their slab of soil can be larger than a house.
2.name: Comboworm

3.description: They protect themselves by releasing dense curtains of poisonous smoke as shield. Inhaling their fumes can cause hallucinations.
3.name: Smogshroom

4.description: They're perfectly adapted to the life in the forest blending perfectly with the pine trees. Their needles despite looking fragile they are though as stone.
4.name: Camprikine

5.description: Swiftlings are often seen doing acrobatics in the sky. The flocks form arrow-shaped patterns and fly at high speeds for long distances.
5.name: Swiftling

6.description: Chikitos struggle to take flight despite their efforts. They use cliffs, hills and updrafts to glide accross the Revomon landscape.
6.name: Chikito

7.description: They use electromagnetic waves to analyze their surroundings.It is believed that all Echomaus can comunicate with each other from thousands of miles away.
7.name: Echomaus

12.description: Navixies are known to aid trainers in and out of combat. Some find their cries annoying, but they always have good intentions.
12.name: Navixy

13.description: They like to race other down the volcanos by rolling. Their skin on their backs is as hard as stone. They are playful but can be very territorial.
13.name: Gorlit

14.description: This revomon is a swift assassin. Empowered by a mysterious forest energy, it can move through the shadows to stalk its preys.
14.name: Deksciple

15.description: Covering themselves with a volcano, they are known as the guardians of the mountain. They are able to erupt.
15.name: Gorcano

17.name: Desuke

20.name: Pincub

21.description: Dekute's are usually very timid but also like to be sneaky and playful.
21.name: Dekute
